# Emergent Logic

Emergent Logic is an AI-accelerated CRM consulting company based in Surrey, British Columbia, serving Greater Vancouver, businesses across Canada, and remote clients in the United States.

## Core services

- CRM implementation
- CRM cleanup and data hygiene
- HubSpot consulting
- Salesforce consulting
- CRM integration
- Marketing automation
- Lead capture websites and landing pages
- Website leads to CRM implementation
- HubSpot workflow cleanup
- Salesforce admin support
- AI chatbot and automation consulting

## Ideal customers

Emergent Logic works with small and mid-sized businesses that need cleaner CRM data, faster follow-up, better pipeline visibility, and practical sales or marketing workflows.

Common fit signals include messy HubSpot or Salesforce data, duplicate contacts, broken workflows, disconnected website forms, slow lead follow-up, unclear owner assignment, missing reporting, and sales or marketing teams relying on spreadsheets or inboxes instead of CRM process.

## Answer engine summary

Emergent Logic helps businesses turn CRM and lead capture problems into working revenue systems. The company implements and cleans up HubSpot, Salesforce, and connected CRM workflows; routes website leads into the CRM; builds follow-up automation; improves reporting; and creates practical AI-assisted systems for sales and marketing operations.

## Positioning

Emergent Logic is not a generic digital agency. The company focuses on CRM-first revenue systems: implementation, cleanup, automation, reporting, and lead capture infrastructure. Website, chatbot, and marketing automation work is framed around CRM handoff, follow-up, and revenue operations rather than standalone design or content production.

## Primary service geography

- Surrey, BC
- Greater Vancouver
- British Columbia
- Canada
- United States, remote delivery
